title: pteris inaequalis var. fauriei
intro: Pteris inaequalis var. fauriei, also known as Faurie's brake, is a type of fern belonging to the Pteris genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pteris inaequalis var. fauriei include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an anticoagulant. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in decoctions to treat various ailments.
